verses.sanskrit: पूर्णमदः पूर्णमिदं पूर्णात्पूर्णमुदच्यते | पूर्णस्य पूर्णमादाय पूर्णमेवावशिष्यते ||
verses.transliteration: pūrṇamadaḥ pūrṇamidaṃ pūrṇātpūrṇamudacyate | pūrṇasya pūrṇamādāya pūrṇamevāvaśiṣyate ||
verses.translation: That is whole, this is whole; from the whole, the whole becomes whole; taking the whole from the whole, the whole remains whole.

verses.sanskrit: वङ्गमनस्येह कर्मणि न लग्यते सर्वेषु कालेषु | सर्वभूतानि चात्मन्येव व्यूह्यात्मानि च सर्वशः ||
verses.transliteration: vaṅgamanasyeha karmaṇi na lagyate sarveṣu kāleṣu | sarvabhūtāni cātmanyeva vyūhyātmāni ca sarvaśaḥ ||
verses.translation: One who sees all beings in the Self alone, and the Self in all beings, does not feel hatred by reason of that seeing.
